project: ORCH-g8c.3 — mctrl supervisor + dispatch integration test
description: Test and verify the mctrl supervisor daemon and dispatch_task CLI end-to-end.
qualityCheck: source ~/.bashrc && PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest src/tests/ --tb=short -q 2>&1 | tail -3
exitCriteria: Supervisor detects a fake in_progress bead with dead session and emits task_needs_human

userStories.title: Supervisor --once runs cleanly with empty registry
userStories.description: Run: PYTHONPATH=src python -m orchestration.supervisor --once 2>&1. Verify it logs 'mctrl supervisor starting' and 'mctrl supervisor stopped' with no errors. Exit code must be 0.

userStories.title: Supervisor detects dead session and emits task_needs_human
userStories.description: Write a tmp registry entry with status=in_progress and a session_name that does NOT exist in tmux (e.g. 'fake-dead-session-xyz'). Run: PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from orchestration.reconciliation import reconcile_registry_once; emitted = reconcile_registry_once(registry_path='/tmp/test-sup-registry.jsonl', outbox_path='/tmp/test-sup-outbox.jsonl'); print(emitted)". First create the registry entry using: PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from orchestration.session_registry import BeadSessionMapping, upsert_mapping; upsert_mapping(BeadSessionMapping.create(bead_id='ORCH-sup-test', session_name='fake-dead-session-xyz', worktree_path='/tmp/fake-wt', branch='feat/test', agent_cli='claude', status='in_progress'), registry_path='/tmp/test-sup-registry.jsonl')". Verify emitted list has 1 item with event=task_needs_human. The outbox should have 1 entry queued (since MCP mail will fail). Stub notify_slack_done to avoid real Slack posts by setting OPENCLAW_SLACK_BOT_TOKEN= and SLACK_BOT_TOKEN= to empty before running.

userStories.title: dispatch_task.py parses ai_orch output correctly
userStories.description: Test the _parse_ai_orch_output function with sample ai_orch output. Run: PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from orchestration.dispatch_task import _parse_ai_orch_output; s,w,b = _parse_ai_orch_output('\U0001f9e9 Worktree: /tmp/ai-orch-worktrees/ai-orch-77258 (branch: ai-orch-77258)\n\U0001f680 Async session: ai-claude-dfa2c0\n'); assert s == 'ai-claude-dfa2c0', f'bad session: {s!r}'; assert w == '/tmp/ai-orch-worktrees/ai-orch-77258', f'bad worktree: {w!r}'; assert b == 'ai-orch-77258', f'bad branch: {b!r}'; print('PARSE OK')". Must print PARSE OK.

userStories.title: Install launchd supervisor and verify it runs
userStories.description: Run: chmod +x scripts/install-mctrl-supervisor.sh && ./scripts/install-mctrl-supervisor.sh. Then verify: launchctl list ai.mctrl.supervisor | grep ai.mctrl.supervisor. Check logs appear at ~/Library/Logs/mctrl/supervisor.log within 10 seconds (tail -5 ~/Library/Logs/mctrl/supervisor.log). The log should contain 'mctrl supervisor starting'. If install fails due to missing SLACK_BOT_TOKEN, that is OK as long as the process starts and logs the message.

userStories.title: Full test suite still passes after new files
userStories.description: Run: source ~/.bashrc && PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest src/tests/ --tb=short -q. Must show 476+ passed. If any tests fail due to new files (dispatch_task.py, supervisor.py), fix them.
